features.name: multiple bitwise AND conditions with mixed slice and single bit comparisons
features.description: Code should include an if statement with multiple && conditions that check both bit-slice equality (vec[1:0]) and single bit equality (vec[n]) of the same vector variable

features.name: bit-slice equality comparison in logical AND chain
features.description: Code should include a multi-bit slice equality comparison (vec[1:0] == 2'b0) used in a logical AND chain within an if statement
features.snippet:
logic [15:0] vec_i;
if (vec_i[1:0] == 2'b0 && vec_i[4] == 1'b0) begin end

features.name: same vector different bit positions in AND conditions
features.description: Code should include multiple conditions checking different bit positions of the same vector (vec[4], vec[8], vec[12]) in an AND chain within an if statement
